entries.title: Contextual Retrieval in AI Systems
entries.description: Explore how Anthropic enhances AI systems through advanced contextual retrieval methods. Learn about our approach to improving information access and relevance in large language models.

entries.description: Discover how Anthropic approaches the development of reliable AI agents. Learn about our research on agent capabilities, safety considerations, and technical framework for building trustworthy AI.

entries.description: Explore Claude's breakthrough performance on SWE-Bench, demonstrating advanced software engineering capabilities and code generation accuracy. Learn about our technical evaluation methods.

entries.title: Coding agents in the social sciences
entries.description: Results from a survey of 1,260 social scientists about AI and coding agent use.

entries.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8
entries.description: Our latest model, Claude Opus 4.8, is an upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consistency to handle long-running work.

entries.title: Anthropic raises $65B in Series H funding at $965B post-money valuation
entries.description: Anthropic has raised $65 billion in Series H funding led by Altimeter Capital, Dragoneer, Greenoaks, and Sequoia Capital.

entries.title: Anthropic confidentially submits draft S-1 to the SEC
entries.description: Anthropic has confidentially submitted a draft S-1 registration statement to the Securities and Exchange Commission

entries.title: Expanding Project Glasswing
entries.description: We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries

entries.title: What we learned mapping a year’s worth of AI-enabled cyber threats
entries.description: As AI transforms the nature of and methods behind cyberattacks, how well do the techniques and frameworks used by the security community hold up? In a new report, we seek to answer that question.

entries.title: Introducing the Services Track and Partner Hub of the Claude Partner Network
entries.description: In March, we launched the Claude Partner Network, a program for the firms that help enterprises put Claude into production.. Today, we’re announcing two new components that make this ecosystem easier for customers to navigate.

entries.title: Mapping AI-enabled cyber threats: Insights from the LLM ATT&CK Navigator
entries.description: Mapping AI-enabled cyber threats: Insights from the LLM ATT&CK Navigator

entries.title: Mapping AI-enabled cyber threats
entries.description: We’ve spent the past year investigating how threat actors are weaponizing AI to conduct cyber operations. Today, we’re sharing a new analysis that maps these real-world attacks onto the MITRE ATT&CK framework, a database of tactics and techniques used by cyberattackers.

entries.title: Claude Fable 5 and Claude Mythos 5
entries.description: Today we’re launching Claude Fable 5: a Mythos-class model that we’ve made safe for general use.

entries.title: Introducing Claude Corps
entries.description: We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America.

entries.title: DXC will integrate Claude into the systems banks, airlines, and other regulated industries rely on
entries.description: We’re announcing a multi-year global alliance with DXC Technology, one of the world’s largest IT services companies.

entries.title: Results from first Anthropic Public Record
entries.description: Anthropic Public Record is a national survey of attitudes and opinions towards AI.

entries.title: TCS and Anthropic partner to bring Claude to regulated industries
entries.description: We’re announcing a partnership with Tata Consultancy Services (TCS). TCS will provide Claude to 50,000 of its own employees across 56 countries; build Claude-powered products for clients in financial services, healthcare, the public sector, and other regulated industries; and join the Claude Partner Network.

entries.title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
entries.description: The US government has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 by any foreign national, whether inside or outside the United States.

entries.title: Agentic coding and persistent returns to expertise
entries.description: Agentic coding and persistent returns to expertise

entries.title: Anthropic opens Seoul office and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem
entries.description: Anthropic opens Seoul and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem—with the enterprises, startups, and researchers behind some of the most ambitious deployments of Claude.

entries.title: Project Fetch: Phase two
entries.description: We report results from our latest test of whether Claude can help Anthropic employees perform sophisticated robotics tasks. We found that Claude Opus 4.7, operating without human assistance, was about 20 times faster than the fastest human team at all tasks completed by participants less than a year ago.

entries.title: Introducing Claude Tag
entries.description: Introducing Claude Tag

entries.title: Anthropic Economic Index report: Cadences
entries.description: In the latest Anthropic Economic Index report, we look at when people come to Claude, what they produce with it, and how they perceive AI’s impact on their work.

entries.title: Introducing Claude Sonnet 5
entries.description: Our most agentic Sonnet yet, with top-tier intelligence for coding and everyday professional work.

entries.title: Claude Science, an AI workbench for scientists
entries.description: Claude Science is a customizable app that integrates the tools and packages researchers most often use, produces auditable artifacts, and provides flexible access to computing resources.

entries.title: Redeploying Claude Fable 5
entries.description: Anthropic is redeploying Claude Fable 5 starting July 1 following the lifting of export controls, with updated cybersecurity safeguards and a new industry jailbreak framework.

entries.title: More details on Fable 5’s cyber safeguards and our jailbreak framework
entries.description: What is and isn't blocked by our cyber classifiers, and a first draft of our jailbreak severity framework

entries.title: Government of Alberta uses Claude to find and fix cybersecurity vulnerabilities
entries.description: The Government of Alberta has been using Claude Code with both Opus and Sonnet models to review its systems, find vulnerabilities, and fix them.

entries.title: A global workspace in language models
entries.description: Interpretability research on Claude's internal thoughts.

entries.title: An off switch for dual use knowledge in AI models
entries.description: New results on a method of controlling access to potentially dangerous AI capabilities

entries.title: A new way to reflect on how you use Claude
entries.description: Introducing a new way to reflect on and refine how you use Claude. It lets you easily track and visualize how you use Claude, and decide whether that time aligns with your goals.

entries.title: Inviting hard questions
entries.description: We're asking the public for their hardest questions about AI, and committing to show our work as we address them.

entries.title: Ben Bernanke appointed to Anthropic’s Long-Term Benefit Trust
entries.description: Ben Bernanke appointed to Anthropic’s Long-Term Benefit Trust

entries.title: UST is bringing Claude to physical AI
entries.description: UST is bringing Claude to physical AI

entries.title: How Claude Performs on Robotics Tasks
entries.description: Do language models’ strengths transfer to robotics? Can a model perceive a scene, understand a particular robot’s state, and issue actions that reliably effect change in the physical world? We ran tests to find out.

entries.title: How Claude's values vary by model and language
entries.description: We analyzed 300,000 real conversations to measure the values Claude expresses across models and languages, compressed into four interpretable axes.

entries.title: Anthropic commits $10 million to Canadian AI research
entries.description: Anthropic is committing $10M to Canadian research institutions to fund the next generation of AI research.

entries.title: How Canada uses Claude
entries.description: How Canada uses Claude

entries.title: Introducing Claude for Teachers
entries.description: Introducing Claude for Teachers

entries.title: Apply for Anthropic’s AI for Science rare disease research grants
entries.description: Anthropic is sharing a focused call for AI for Science applications centered specifically on rare genetic diseases. Accepted applicants will receive up to $50,000 in Claude credits over six months, with the goal of building a community of researchers looking into how AI can reshape our understanding of rare disease.

entries.title: Donating another $20 million to Public First Action
entries.description: Anthropic is contributing an additional $20 million to Public First Action, bringing our total support to $40 million.

entries.title: Supporting ambitious external research through the Anthropic Economic Futures Research Fund
entries.description: We’re committing $200 million to the Anthropic Economic Futures Research Fund to support ambitious external research.

entries.title: The Anthropic Economic Index connector
entries.description: We're launching the Anthropic Economic Index connector for Claude, which lets anyone explore the data directly.
